protein_name: May be involved in signal transduction as a component of a multimeric receptor complex. Belongs to the MS4A family. Variable expression in some B-cell, myelomonocytic, and erythroleukemia cell lines. 5 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
